name: JellyFusion
description: All-in-one Jellyfin plugin: Netflix-style slider, quality badges (LAT/SUB/NUEVO/KID), studios, themes and notifications.
overview: Combines EditorS Choice and JellyTag into a single unified plugin with multi-language support.

versions.changelog: UI fixes: tabs now clickable, inlined CSS/JS into configuration page, professional styling refresh, i18n language-switcher works client-side.
Jellyfin 10.10 compatibility fixes: VideoRangeType enum, InternalItemsQuery.StudioIds, PluginServiceRegistrator signature, raw-string theme CSS.
